message:
🐛 Fix Generate Platform Install Missions workflow (#877)

The "Collect reports" step fails with exit code 1 when no
platform-report-*.md files exist. Without nullglob, bash expands the
glob to the literal string "platform-report-*.md", then the test
`[ -f "$f" ] && cat "$f"` returns exit code 1 (test fails, && short-
circuits). Because this is the last command in the script and bash -e
is active, the step fails.

Fix: enable nullglob so the for loop simply doesn't execute when no
report files are present. This also removes the now-unnecessary
`[ -f "$f" ]` guard since nullglob guarantees only real files match.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -206,10 +206,12 @@ jobs:
           echo "- Security blocked: ${{ steps.security.outputs.security_blocked || '0' }}" >> collect-report.md
           echo "" >> collect-report.md
 
-          # Append individual reports
+          # Append individual reports (use nullglob to handle no matches gracefully)
+          shopt -s nullglob
           for f in platform-report-*.md; do
-            [ -f "$f" ] && cat "$f" >> collect-report.md
+            cat "$f" >> collect-report.md
           done
+          shopt -u nullglob
 
       - name: Create PR
         env:
